name: superglue-integration-builder
description: Build and verify Superglue natural-language integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Build and verify Superglue natural-language integrations.
interface.longDescription: Help agents turn integration requests into explicit schemas, auth assumptions, generated tool metadata, and regression checks for Superglue workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Superglue plugin to plan the workflow, identify verification checks, and produce plugin eval metadata.
